name: Basalt Sunday Market
notes: On-file website https://www.basaltsundaymarket.com is dead (connection refused). The market is run by the Town of Basalt; its official page is https://www.basalt.net/606/Basalt-Sunday-Market, listing 2026 season dates (June 14 - Sept 27, Sundays 10am-2pm), location along Midland Spur adjacent to Lions Park and Basalt Town Hall, manager contact email/phone. Confirmed the Facebook page facebook.com/BasaltSundayMarket/ exists and matches the market name/city via search, but its content could not be fetched (blocked), so no additional fields (products, SNAP, Instagram, ADA, organic) could be verified from it. Did not change on-file address (101 Midland Avenue) since the official page describes the same general location (near Basalt Town Hall) without a distinct clearer street address. Products, SNAP/EBT, ADA accessibility, and certified organic status not stated on the official page.
